Pope to Launch Encyclical on Al Alongside Anthropic CoFounder
By Flavia Rotondi
05/18/2026 09:09:02 [BN]
(Bloomberg) -- Pope Leo XIV's launch of his first encyclical focusing on artificial intelligence next week will feature an unexpected guest: Christopher Olah, cofounder of Anthropic.
Olah, an expert of machine learning, will join Pope Leo at the highly awaited launch of the pontiff's first encyclical on May 25, the Vatican said Monday.
Other speakers including Vatican secretary of state, Cardinal Pietro Parolin, and Cardinal Victor Manuel Fernandez, will also speak at the publication of the encyclical Magnifica Humanitas, expected to outline the pope's views on preserving humans in the age of Al.
Pope Leo XIV
Pope Leo, who was became the first ever US pope one year ago, haspicked Al as a key issue in his pontificate, often referring to it in his speeches and public moments.

images.alt:
📜 Beschreibung 》
Ephthal galt als außergewöhnlicher Magier und verbrachte sein gesamtes Leben damit, die Geheimnisse der Magie zu ergründen. Doch je näher er dem Gipfel kam, desto deutlicher spürte er die Grenzen seines eigenen Talents. Diese Erkenntnis stürzte ihn in tiefe Verzweiflung und beendete seinen ersten Lebensweg bitter. 400 Jahre später erhält er jedoch eine zweite Chance: Ephthal wird erneut wiedergeboren und tritt einer Magieakademie bei. Dort trifft er auf eine Welt, in der die Magie im Vergleich zu seiner Zeit deutlich schwächer geworden ist. Mit den Techniken und dem Wissen aus seinem früheren Leben wirkt er mühelos Zauber, die längst als Legende gelten. Seine überwältigende Macht sorgt für Staunen, Angst und Widerstand zugleich. Und während er sich Schritt für Schritt an die Spitze zurückkämpft, beginnt die Welt um ihn herum zu begreifen, dass sich das Zeitalter der Magie gerade radikal verändert.

🎵 ED 》„Arikitari na Nichijō to Kōun na Hibi e“ von Meishō Hikōkai

📜 Beschreibung 》
Ein Riss in den Dimensionen bedroht die Welt. Der Magier Rakku stellt sich mit seinen Gefährten dem Kampf. Als es brenzlig wird, schickt er seine Kameraden durch ein Portal zurück und bleibt allein, um die Front zu halten. Nach einem epischen Sieg gelingt auch ihm die Rückkehr, doch inzwischen sind zehn Jahre vergangen. Rakku gilt als Legende, aber weil er keinen Tag gealtert ist, erkennt ihn niemand als den Helden von damals. Und dass er trotz seines jugendlichen Aussehens längst das höchste Level erreicht hat, glaubt ihm erst recht keiner.

record.text:
Positive indications from early grass silage analysis
->Farming Online | More on "Grass silage quality early analysis" at BigEarthData.ai

external.description: Early indications suggest that this year's first-cut silage could potentially bring an extra litre/cow per day benefit, according to samples taken by Mole Valley Farmers. With the growing trend for multi-cut systems, and the dry spring, first cut silage was particularly early, and analyses of 180 samples has revealed interesting results. Overall, average analyses are slightly drier (34.82%) than the past couple of years, reflecting a relatively dry and windy spring for many. As might be expected with an earlier cut, digestibility or D values have shown a marked increase on last year, to 70.29% (2024 - 68.7%; 2025 - 67.9%) with an associated increase in energy value to 11.25MJ/ kg dry matter (DM), says Robin Hawkey, senior nutritionist at Mole Valley Farmers. "This is also demonstrated by increased rapidly and totally fermentable carbohydrates." Crude protein levels, at 14.84%, are also better compared to 2024 (14.4%) and 2025 (14.2%). Rapidly fermentable protein levels are slightly lower, while total fermentable protein content is enhanced. "The rumen fermentable energy/protein balance (Nutriopt fermentable energy protein balance or NFEPB) is slightly reduced due to higher fermentable energy content and lower rapidly fermentable protein," notes Dr Hawkey. "This could have consequences for rumen synchrony and...
external.title: Positive indications from early grass silage analysis

Sobering-up centre to close less than four years after public intoxication reforms
->Australian Broadcasting Corporation | More on "Sobering-up centre closure intoxication reforms" at BigEarthData.ai

external.description: Victoria's sobering-up centre in Collingwood will close next year, ending a support service for people found drunk in public less than four years after the offence was abolished. Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander readers are advised that this article contains names and images of a person who has died. The image has been used with family permission. The Department of Health, which confirmed the closure after questions from the ABC last week, insisted dedicated centres for Aboriginal people and outreach for the general population would continue. The 20-bed site run by cohealth has endured criticism for low uptake since it opened in November 2023, when public intoxication was decriminalised and health workers took responsibility from police. Outreach workers have since supported people who are drunk in public by offering water, help to get home, or phoning family. If needed, people are transported to the centre to sober up. But a redesign of the framework over the coming year means people who are drunk in public and need extra support will progressively be taken to local health and community services instead of the Collingwood site, which will then close in mid-2027. The department did not immediately explain which services would take...
external.title: Sobering-up centre to close less than four years after public intoxication reforms

1. Important note in here: Given the high visibility of evangelical Christianity in the U.S. — very much including yesterday's Rededicate 250 event — you'd be forgiven for thinking the majority of U.S. Christians are evangelicals.

But that is very much not the case!

record.text:
這個開源專案 MiniMind 提供一個從零開始訓練 64M 小型 LLM 的方法。主打成本低（約 3 塊人民幣）和時間短（單張 3090 兩小時跑完 SFT 一個 epoch），讓個人 GPU 也能快速訓練和複現。

專案內含完整的 LLM 訓練流程，從數據清洗、Pretrain、SFT 到 LoRA、DPO、Agentic RL 等都有對應程式碼。特別的是，它還擴展到多模態模型 MiniMind-V 和 MiniMind-O。所有核心演算法都用 PyTorch 原生實現，不依賴高階抽象接口。對於想入門和實作 LLM 的人來說，是個不錯的起點，可以從中了解整個大模型訓練的脈絡。

#LLM訓

這篇文章的作者打造了一個開源的 AI Agent 作業系統，目的是整合現有不同的 Agent 工具。像是 opencode 處理程式碼、Hermes 負責排程與記憶、Gemini CLI 進行研究，過去這些工具都獨立運作，沒有共享的 context。

這個 Agent OS 透過 7 層架構來解決問題，其中 Layer 1 Agent Router 負責自動分派任務。目前看來是想讓多個 Agent 能在統一的介面下協同工作，避免每次切換工具都要重頭開始的痛點。這對於需要同時使用多個專業 Agent 的使用者來說，或許能提升效率。

有興趣的可以看看他的 GitHub。

#AIAgent #

看到一則國外新聞，有家長控告 OpenAI，指稱 ChatGPT 提供的藥物建議導致其子死亡。這點出了 LLM 在提供專業建議（特別是醫療相關）時的風險。目前看來，即使有安全防護機制，LLM 仍可能生成有害內容。這也提醒我們，在使用這類工具時，仍需保持謹慎並尋求專業意見。

In "Fahrenheit 451," digests refer to the simplified, condensed versions of information that society consumes, reflecting a culture that prioritizes speed over depth and understanding.
Concept of Digests
In Ray Bradbury's "Fahrenheit 451," the term
"digests" is used to describe the way information is presented in a highly condensed format, making it easily consumable for the masses. This concept is illustrated through a conversation between the protagonist, Montag, and his fire chief, Beatty.
Beatty explains that as society evolved, the complexity of literature and knowledge was reduced to brief summaries or "digests" that could be quickly read and understood. He states,
"Digest-digests, digest-digest-digests.
Politics? One column, two sentences, a headline!" This reflects a society that has become accustomed to rapid consumption of information, leading to a lack of critical thinking and deeper understanding @wordpress.com +1 .
Implications of Digests
The prevalence of digests in the novel symbolizes the broader theme of censorship and the dangers

GitHub Copilot moves to token based billing on June 1, and its users have now got a calculator that shows how much they've been actually burning every month - some $39-a-month users have spent $1500 to $5800 in tokens a month. Microsoft's subsidies are insane.

www.wheresyoured.at/premium-what...

images.alt:
So, for the uninitiated, the vast majority of AI startups — from search engines like Perplexity to legal software like Harvey to even Anthropic’s Claude subscriptions — do not bill users based on their actual token burn. 

When you search a query on Perplexity, Perplexity itself pays the per-million-token rate — for example, Claude Sonnet 4.6 costs $3 per million input tokens (about four characters) and $15 per-million output tokens (both the stuff it creates and the plans it makes to execute an output using chain-of-thought reasoning, which I explained here). You, the customer, pay a simple flat fee each month. 

As a result, you’re shielded from the actual cost of the prompt. You’re also shielded from the knowledge of the prompt’s cost.

Another good example is Microsoft’s AI coding tool GitHub Copilot, where users would get a certain amount of “premium requests” per month, with newer and more-powerful models costing more requests, and users able to buy more “premium requests” for a fee. As of June 1, 2026, Microsoft will move every GitHub Copilot subscriber to token-based billing, leading to users paying what their actual costs might be. 

To ease the transition — if you can call it that — Microsoft has created a calculator to show how much your current GitHub Copilot usage would cost if you were actually paying for tokens, and the results are brutal:

One user paying $10-a-month burned around $46.70 of tokens, and this is one of the least-gratuitous examples I could find.
This guy spending $10-a-month burned $54.26 in tokens, and this one spent $23.81 in tokens. This guy spent $81 in tokens.
One user paying around $39-a-month burned $1357.16 of tokens.
One user who paid around $54.43 in a month burned $1,196.55 in tokens.
One user spending $39-a-month burned $204.55 in tokens.
One user spending $39-a-month burned $5,851.77 in tokens.
One user spending $39-a-month burned $595.83 in tokens.
One user spending $39-a-month burned $1,063.52.

Windows Sandbox is a lightweight virtual environment built directly into Windows 11. It allows you to run suspicious apps, test software, or explore settings in an isolated space without affecting your main operating system.

2026年5月18日，一日记录。

早上因为车被困在凤凰汇，只能陪哈妹一路走路去学校；晚上下班后又急急忙忙去接她。中间还穿插着工作里的现实问题——Copilot 和 Codex 都有点慢，token 用量也越来越像真正的开发成本。

record.text:
2026年5月13日，早晨记录。

今天这条视频是在记录一种最近真实的状态：有点累，有点 down，对很多事情都提不起劲，连原本在推进的项目也暂时停了下来。

一路上我在想，低迷的时候到底该做点什么。也许不是逼自己立刻产出，而是先做一点小事：给家里打个电话，买杯咖啡，重新看看手头的 repo，或者只是拍一下上班的路。先把自己慢慢接回到生活里。

images.alt: A person wearing a helmet and glasses is standing outside with trees in the background, and there is text overlay in Chinese and English.
A person wearing a helmet and glasses is standing outside with trees in the background, and there is text overlay in Chinese and English.

record.text:
2026年5月14日，一日记录。

早上换了一条新路去上班，和哈妹在起床后的那一点点亲子时光，也顺着聊到了最近让我有点卡住的一件事——怎么把 Memory 的设计、实现和讲解真正说清楚。

晚上下班后，又继续复盘了一天的状态：工作节奏慢慢恢复，团队开始陆续收尾前几天积压的内容，我也在 Codex 和 Copilot 之间继续摸索更顺手的工作流。再加上一点生活里的小片段，哈妹的表演、小眼到香港后的分享……

images.alt: A person wearing glasses and a helmet is looking ahead, with a date stamp 2026年5月14日 周四 at the top.

Microsoft fait évoluer Copilot Search.
À partir de mai 2026, Microsoft Edge pourra, avec l’accord de l’IT, utiliser l’historique de navigation professionnel pour améliorer la pertinence des recherches dans Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Objectif : retrouver plus vite des pages déjà consultées.

external.description: À partir de mai 2026, Microsoft Edge pourra, avec l’accord de l’administrateur, partager une partie de l’historique de navigation professionnelle avec Microsoft 365 Copilot Search. L’objectif est simple : vous faire gagner du temps quand vous cherchez une information que vous avez déjà consultée. Concrètement, qu’est-ce que ça change ? Si votre entreprise active cette fonctionnalité, Copilot pourra remonter plus rapidement : des pages SharePoint déjà visitées, des fichiers ou applications Microsoft, certains sites ou outils métiers tiers validés par l’IT. Résultat : moins de temps à chercher, moins de doublons, et une recherche plus pertinente dans Microsoft 365.
external.title: Microsoft Edge et Copilot : une recherche plus intelligente grâce à l’historique de navigation pro

record.text:
Microsoft va bloquer définitivement TLS 1.0 et 1.1 pour les connexions POP et IMAP dans Exchange Online.
Si tu utilises encore des applications ou équipements anciens, c’est le moment de vérifier leur compatibilité TLS 1.2 minimum. Blocage prévu à partir de juillet 2026.

external.description: Une nouvelle étape dans la sécurisation d’Exchange Online : la suppression définitive de TLS 1.0 et TLS 1.1 pour les connexions POP3 et IMAP4. Ces versions de TLS sont considérées comme obsolètes et ne répondent plus aux standards de sécurité actuels. Pourquoi Microsoft fait ce choix ? TLS 1.0 et 1.1 sont dépréciés depuis longtemps. Ils exposent les environnements à des risques inutiles.Aujourd’hui, TLS 1.2 est la norme minimale, et la plupart des clients de messagerie modernes l’utilisent déjà. Microsoft avait laissé une période de tolérance via des endpoints spécifiques.
external.title: Exchange Online renforce la sécurité des connexions POP et IMAP

record.text:
Windows 11の必須更新が35%で止まる不具合が起きています。

原因はディスクの故障ではなく、利用者からは見えない隠し区画「EFIシステムパーティション(ESP)」の空き不足でした。

ESPは起動ファイルを置く100MB前後の小さな領域で、空きが10MB以下だと更新が止まりやすくなります。

Microsoftはすでに自動修正を配布済みで、多くの個人PCは再起動だけで直ります。

youtu.be/qPwrMHqvrg0

#Windows11 #Microsoft #KB5089549
Windows 11 update fails at 35%

external.description: YouTube video by 情報の灯台
